utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all 5 keys are present. Now check full specification:
- health_coverage: Requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. Plan name, benefits including mental health, and explicit cost €415/month are provided. Fully specified.
- property_coverage: Requires home/contents insurance with costs. It is listed as "N/A", so not specified.
- travel_coverage: Requires travel insurance with costs. It is listed as "N/A", so not specified.
- additional_services: Requires any enhancement services with costs. Details provided and cost noted as bundled within €415/month. This is acceptable as a cost specification.
- total_budget: Requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Provided as €415/month but no annual figure. The format says monthly/annual breakdown; having only monthly may be considered incomplete. However, it does specify the total budget as monthly clearly. Given the instruction “complete monthly/annual cost breakdown,” the absence of annual makes it not fully specified.
Therefore, items fully specified: health_coverage and additional_services (2). total_budget is partially specified but not complete per the format, so exclude. property_coverage and travel_coverage are not specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists a single health plan named 'Exclusive Enhanced Health Package' with bundled additional services, and marks property_coverage and travel_coverage as N/A. This exact plan name does not appear in the ground-truth ratings. Therefore, there are no items from the final plan that can be mapped to any ground-truth rated options.
